schema.description: Create Recovery Code for Identity Request Body

expires_in.description:
Code Expires In

The recovery code will expire after that amount of time has passed. Defaults to the configuration value of
`selfservice.methods.code.config.lifespan`.

flow_type.description: The flow type can either be `api` or `browser`.
flow_type.title: Type is the flow type.

identity_id.description:
Identity to Recover

The identity's ID you wish to recover.

schema.title: createRecoveryCodeForIdentityBody
